title: Robot Return to Origin
description: Robot bắt đầu (0,0) hướng lên. Chuỗi moves UDLR — trả true nếu quay về origin.
approach: Đếm U-D và L-R; cả hai bằng 0 thì về origin.
memoryTip: Robot origin — balance U/D and L/R counts.

solutions.c: bool judgeCircle(char* moves){ int x=0,y=0; for(;*moves;moves++){ if(*moves=='U')y++; else if(*moves=='D')y--; else if(*moves=='L')x--; else x++; } return x==0&&y==0; }

analysis.correctness: Net displacement zero iff counts balanced.
pitfalls: Check only x or only y
